appliedUpdates.description: Fixed test file paths from system/test/src/ to system/test/tests/
Added 9p, rtc, and tablet device flags to QEMU visual testing guidance; added keystroke delay recommendation (>=0.05s)

notes: All 15 assertions passed. 13 verified via host-side unit tests, 2 via QEMU framebuffer screenshots. Pre-existing kernel bugs (EC=0x22, EC=0x25) appeared during QEMU testing but did not affect display pipeline correctness. QEMU visual tests required 9p filesystem flags for font loading — corrected in user-testing.md for future runs.
